LAW AND MOTION 301, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CHI HUNG LEE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, THE COURT TREATS THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS A MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING AND GRANTS IT WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH THAT THE RENT BOARD ADVICE WAS TIMELY GIVEN. OTHERWISE PLAINTIFF IS RELEGATED TO A NEW CASE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. LAURA SLADE CHIERA, TEL. NO. 865-9214 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CHI HUNG LEE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, THE COURT TREATS THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AS A MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADING AND GRANTS IT WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND IF PLAINTIFF CAN PLEAD IN GOOD FAITH THAT THE RENT BOARD ADVICE WAS TIMELY GIVEN. OTHERWISE PLAINTIFF IS RELEGATED TO A NEW CASE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

Plaintiff'S Motion For Leave To Amend
Off Calendar Jul-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. LAURA SLADE CHIERA, TEL. NO. 865-9214 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Yuzhen Ou's Motion For Leave To Amend is denied in light of the ruling on the Motion for Summary Judgment. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jul-20-2011 Continued To Jul-22-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jun-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Chi Hung Lee, 415-722-2312, defendant and moving party appearing propria persona
Yuzhen Ou, 415-244-2098, plaintiff and opposing party appearing propria persona
Ed Lui, 415-713-1842, certified interpreter

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT CHI LEE MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS GRANTED. DEFAULT IS VACATED AND DEFENDANT MUST FILE HER PROPOSED ANSWER BY 6/9/11. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol Karen CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
